---
title: "Sessions"
transition_status: "updated"
transition_comment: "update"
---

Delivering sessions

## Beamer checklist

### 🔌 Connect & Activate Display
- **Windows:** `Win + P` → select *Duplicate* or *Extend*  
- **Fedora / Linux (GNOME):**
  - Open **Settings → Displays**
  - Or use keyboard shortcut (often): `Fn + F8 / F7` (device-dependent)

### ⚡ Before You Start (Always Test!)
- **Font size & readability**
  - Check from the **back of the room**
  - Avoid overcrowded slides
- **Latency / responsiveness**
  - Move mouse, switch slides
  - Watch for lag (especially with HDMI)

### 🔄 If There Is Lag
- Try a different connection:
  - Prefer **USB-C → HDMI / DisplayPort**
  - Avoid problematic HDMI ports if possible
- Check display settings:
  - Ensure **60 Hz refresh rate**
  - Reduce resolution if needed
- **Restart the system** if issues persist (can reset display detection and drivers)

### 🧑‍🔧 Preparation
- Bring contact details of the **local tech/support team**
- Arrive early to test setup with available equipment

### 🎒 Always Bring
- USB-C → HDMI adapter  
- HDMI cable  
- (Optional) USB-C → DisplayPort adapter  
- Charger (some adapters drain battery faster)

::: {.callout-important title="FS"}
- We can borrow a replacement laptop (Windows) at the reception
- The phone numbers (attached to the speakers table) should work, otherwise, go to the reception to get help
:::

## Interaction

TODO
